# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing behavior it affects.

## Surface Changed

- [ ] R package API or data
- [ ] Bundled Shiny app
- [ ] Browser app
- [ ] Data pipeline or bundled data
- [ ] Documentation or website
- [ ] CI, release, or CRAN metadata

## Checks Run

List the commands you ran and their results.

```text

```

## Data and Claims

- [ ] No change to bundled guideline/checklist data
- [ ] Data provenance and rights are documented
- [ ] Public wording still states checklist coverage honestly
- [ ] R, Shiny, and browser data remain in sync when relevant

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out any known limitations, skipped checks, or follow-up work.
